resources.string:
Quant Launcher needs a few permissions so Launchpad can list your apps — including GBox — and work as your tablet desktop.

• See all installed apps (including GBox)
• Notifications (Android 13+)

Next, you'll be asked to set Quant Launcher as your default Home app.
To open this desktop every time you press Home, set Quant Launcher as your default Home / launcher app.
GBox not installed — install GBox to see virtual apps here.
